intentSynonyms: write a new message in telegram
send a message to a chat in telegram
description: Send a text message to a Telegram conversation. Supports Markdown-style formatting. The message is sent immediately.

peer_id.description: Peer ID to send the message to (user, chat, or channel ID)

text.description: Message text to send (supports Markdown formatting)

reply_to_msg_id.description: Message ID to reply to (creates a threaded reply)
